item.title: DHS shutdown drags into week two as Iran threat, SOTU clash complicate Hill talks
item.description: The funding standoff remained steady over Homeland Security funding while other issues, like possible conflict with Iran, tariffs and the State of the...

item.title: Who is Abigail Spanberger, and why did Democrats choose her for to their State of the Union response?
item.description: Virginia Gov. Abigail Spanberger, a former House Democrat, is delivering her party's rebuttal to the State of the Union on Tuesday night.

item.title: Thomas rips Supreme Court tariffs ruling, says majority 'errs' on Constitution
item.description: Justice Clarence Thomas cited President Richard Nixon's 1971 import surcharge precedent in his dissent, arguing Congress authorized tariff authority u...

item.title: Florida bill would let churches use armed volunteers instead of licensed security
item.description: A Florida bill would allow churches, synagogues and mosques to use armed volunteers for security instead of costly licensed guards amid rising violenc...

item.title: 'It's hidden': Female genital mutilation and the secret shame of Minnesota's Somalis
item.description: Minnesota has zero convictions for female genital mutilation despite hundreds of thousands at risk nationwide and the state's large Somali population.
